title: EPITALON
description: Epitalon (Epithalon) is a synthetic tetrapeptide that activates telomerase, potentially lengthening telomeres and extending cellular lifespan. Developed by Vladimir Khavinson, it's used primarily for anti-aging and longevity purposes.

research.title: AEDG Peptide (Epitalon) Stimulates Gene Expression and Protein Synthesis during Neurogenesis
research.summary: Study showing AEDG peptide enhances pineal gland, retina, and brain function while extending lifespan and reducing cancer risk.
research.source: (Saint Petersburg Institute of Bioregulation and Gerontology)

research.title: Effect of Epitalon on biomarkers of aging, life span and spontaneous tumor incidence in female Swiss-derived SHR mice
research.summary: Research documenting how Epitalon slowed estrous decline, reduced chromosomal aberrations, extended lifespan in final survivors, inhibited leukemia.

research.title: Effect of epitalon on the lifespan increase in Drosophila melanogaster
research.summary: Research finding synthetic peptide extended fruit fly lifespan 11-16% at extremely low concentrations, demonstrating potent antioxidant properties.
research.source: (St. Petersburg Institute of Bioregulation and Gerontology)

research.title: Epitalon protects against post-ovulatory aging-related damage of mouse oocytes in vitro
research.summary: Investigation showing Epitalon improved oocyte quality by reducing oxidative stress, spindle defects, and apoptosis.

research.title: Epitalon and colon carcinogenesis in rats: Proliferative activity and apoptosis in colon tumors and mucosa
research.summary: Research demonstrating continuous Epitalon treatment significantly inhibited tumor cell division and increased programmed cell death.

sentiment.summary: Users interested in longevity report improved energy, sleep quality, and general well-being. Effects on aging are difficult to measure subjectively. Popular in the anti-aging community.

effects.label: Difficult to Measure:
effects.description: Anti-aging effects hard to assess short-term.

effects.label: Subjective Improvements:
effects.description: Many report feeling better and more energetic.

effects.label: Long-Term Approach:
effects.description: Benefits may manifest over extended use periods.

dosage.label: Standard Protocol:
dosage.description: 10mg daily for 10-20 days, cycled 1-2 times per year.

dosage.label: Cycling:
dosage.description: Usually done in courses rather than continuous use.

sideEffects.label: Generally Safe:
sideEffects.description: Few side effects reported at standard doses.

availability.label: Specialized Sourcing:
availability.description: Not as common as some other peptides.
